# Phasing report: all variants
### Phasing error rates, chromosome 1
#### Combined error rates:
 - Trios = Number of trios
 - Sites = Total number of sites where error can occur (summed over all trios)
 - Errors = Total number of errors

| Shared chips | Trios | Sites | Errors | Error rate |
|:----|:----|:----|:----|:----|
| 0 | 8087 | 204421711 | 2290889 | 0.011 |
| 1 | 4005 | 103298122 | 33315 | 0.00032 |
| 2 | 42503 | 1101925617 | 96586 | 8.8e-05 |
| Total | 54595 | 1409645450 | 2420790 | 0.0017 |


#### Individual error rates:
| Shared chips | min | max | median | mean |
|:----|:----|:----|:----|:----|
| 0 | 0 | 0.12 | 0.0076 | 0.011 |
| 1 | 0 | 0.015 | 7.7e-05 | 0.00032 |
| 2 | 0 | 0.021 | 0 | 8.8e-05 |
| Total | 0 | 0.12 | 0 | 0.0018 |


#### Histogram of individual error rates:
![](phasing_plots/phasing_error_rates_chr1_0shared_chips.png)
![](phasing_plots/phasing_error_rates_chr1_1shared_chips.png)
![](phasing_plots/phasing_error_rates_chr1_2shared_chips.png)
![](phasing_plots/phasing_error_rates_chr1_total.png)

### Phasing error rates, chromosome 22
#### Combined error rates:
 - Trios = Number of trios
 - Sites = Total number of sites where error can occur (summed over all trios)
 - Errors = Total number of errors
